source_jobs.title: Strategy and Operations Associate
source_jobs.description:
MOVE FROM SOLVING PROBLEMS FOR CLIENTS TO OWNING STRATEGIC INITIATIVES END-TO-END.



We're not building another legal AI assistant. We're building one of the first agentic systems for enterprise legal and compliance teams that actually automates their manual work. End-to-end.

In two years, Haast has transformed compliance from a painful checkbox exercise into a smart, automated workflow, cutting review times by 80% and boosting productivity 4x. We recently closed a $12M USD Series A (Peak XV Partners, DST Global, Airtree) and are scaling into global markets.

Design has Canva. Projects have Atlassian. Compliance has Haast.





THE ROLE



If you've spent the last few years advising from the sidelines, this is where you move from watching to building.

You'll sit at the intersection of every function in the business; Sales, Customer Success, Product, Finance, and help the leadership team diagnose what's broken, roadmap what's to come, build the solution, and navigate what happens next.

One week you might be revamping our pricing model. The next, you're helping design the next generation of our AI agent. You'll be the person leadership turns to when something is complex, ambiguous, or high-stakes, because you don't need a perfectly defined brief to make sense of chaos.




What You'll Own

 - Strategy & Planning: Work closely with leadership to define OKRs, manage business planning cycles, and refine our Go-To-Market strategy

 - Diagnosis & Consulting: Jump into critical problems across Sales, CS, Product, and Finance. Spend 2–4 weeks on a sprint, then move to what matters most next

 - Operating System: Define the playbooks and processes that let us scale 10x without burning out

 - Data & Truth: Own the numbers. Dig into data to answer the questions that actually move the needle, pricing optimization, sales funnel leakage, customer retention patterns

 - Problem-to-Solution: When you spot an operational problem with a tech fix, scope it out and work with our engineering team to get it built
   
   

Who We're Looking For

 - Proven problem-solving experience from a top-tier management consulting firm (MBB or Tier 1.5), investment banking, or high-growth scale-ups. You know how to break down ambiguous problems and drive to an answer.

 - Operator's DNA: You loved the strategy part of consulting but hated handing off the slides. You want to roll up your sleeves and own execution.

 - High analytical rigor: You're not satisfied until you've fully solved the problem. You dive into data, ask the right questions, and understand the pain point completely.

 - Comfort with ambiguity: You can walk into a messy situation, identify the root cause, and create order from chaos.

 - High EQ and genuine influence: You build relationships quickly with engineers, lawyers, and sales leaders alike—and you get things done without formal authority.

 - Real excitement about AI: You're already tinkering with LLMs and thinking about how they change business. This isn't abstract for you.



Why Join Haast

 - Real impact from day one: You're not running reports or sitting in meetings. You're diagnosing problems and shipping solutions that directly affect how we serve enterprise customers.

 - Meaningful equity upside: We're building a generational company in a $50B market. We share success with the people who build it.

 - Exceptional learning velocity: You'll learn more in 12 months here than most roles offer in 3 years. You'll work with a leadership team with roots in MBB and top-tier law.

 - Variety and agency: No two weeks will be the same. You'll move between pricing models, AI agent design, sales operations, and customer strategy.

 - Sydney-based, genuinely flexible: We work flexibly from our Sydney office.
   
   

How to Apply

Tell us about a time you jumped into an ambiguous, high-stakes problem at a consulting firm, in a startup, or anywhere else. What was broken? How did you figure out what to fix? And what happened after you did?

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Enterprise Account Executive - Early US GTM Team

Join a high-growth AI company transforming how global enterprises manage compliance in a multi-billion dollar market - as one of the first members of our growing US GTM team.

About Haast

Haast is one of the first enterprise-grade AI platforms for compliance and legal teams, already trusted by major regulated enterprises, VC-backed, and expanding fast in the US.

We've transformed compliance from a painful checkbox exercise into an intelligent, automated workflow, cutting review times by 80% and boosting productivity 4x.

Think Canva for design. Atlassian for projects. Haast for compliance.

With a $12M Series A behind us, led by Peak XV Partners with backing from DST Global and Airtree, we're focused on what's next: global expansion.



The Role: Enterprise Account Executive (US)

We’re expanding rapidly into the US market and building out our GTM team. This role will join as a key early contributor helping shape and scale our US presence.

This is an early-stage, high-ownership role for someone who thrives in ambiguity, loves building, and wants to play a pivotal part in defining the commercial engine of a company at the forefront of enterprise AI.

You’ll combine strategic enterprise sales execution with storytelling and category creation - showing US enterprises how AI can transform compliance from burden to advantage.



What you’ll own

 - Build the US GTM motion: define outreach strategies, shape pipeline, and open key enterprise doors across regulated industries like financial services and insurance.

 - Drive revenue growth: lead enterprise conversations from discovery through to close.

 - Consult and demo: translate complex AI capabilities into business value.

 - Be the market voice: surface insights from US customers and influence our global product roadmap.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally: with Product, Engineering, and Marketing to fine-tune GTM playbooks.

 - Represent Haast: at industry events and across your growing network of compliance and legal leaders.



What we’re looking for

 - Enterprise sales pedigree: Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and selling to Fortune 500. You have strong experience navigating complex B2B SaaS cycles and have solid relationships within regulated enterprise organisations.

 - Industry fluency: You get how compliance actually works in regulated industries and understand how the right tech can ease the load and unlock real business value.

 - Clear communicator: You can take complex concepts and distill them into sharp, business-relevant messaging.

 - Start-up mindset: Comfortable with ambiguity, adaptable, and excited to help shape new processes in a high-growth environment.

 - AI-curious: You’re fascinated by the technology shift happening in front of us and want to be part of shaping it.
   
   

Nice to have, but not essential

 - Experience working in or selling to enterprise marketing legal, risk, or compliance teams.

 - Time spent in a scale-up or startup where you’ve had to wear multiple hats and move fast.



Why Haast?

Growth & Impact

 - Impact: Join as one of the first US GTM hires and help define our presence in a $50B+ market.

 - Ownership: Partner with the founders to shape GTM strategy, product feedback loops, and US growth.

 - Trajectory: Work with top-tier enterprise customers, backed by strong traction in Australia and VC support.

 - Growth: Learn more in 12 months than most roles offer in three years.

 - Purpose: Help marketing, legal and compliance teams leap from manual, error-prone reviews to intelligent, AI-powered workflows.
   
   

Benefits & Culture

 - Career defining role: Early US GTM team member helping shape the next phase of our growth.

 - Compensation & benefits: Competitive OTE ($300k+), lucrative compensation plan & meaningful equity options

 - Benefits: 401k, health insurance, generous PTO, US Remote/Flexible working.

 - Culture: Ambitious, engineering-led, and bui

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer - Integrations
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR FULL STACK ENGINEER – INTEGRATIONS

Build the integration layer that connects enterprise compliance to the tools teams actually use.



About Haast

We're building one of the first agentic systems for enterprise legal and compliance teams that actually automates their manual work. End-to-end. Delivering 80% faster compliance reviews and 4x productivity gains.

We recently closed a $12M USD Series A (Peak XV Partners, DST Global, Airtree) and are ramping hard; building the infrastructure that will completely re-define how enterprises think about compliance.

Think Canva for design. Atlassian for projects. Haast for compliance.




The Problem

Enterprise legal and compliance teams don't work in isolation. They manage workflows across dozens of different tools.

The winners in this space aren't defined by their AI, they're defined by their integrations. Embed compliance intelligence directly into the tools teams already use daily? That's how you get real adoption.

We've built a world-class agentic compliance platform. Now we need to build out our integration layer that puts it everywhere our customers need it.



The Role

This is a full-stack role focused on integration architecture and platform connectivity. You'll own the strategy, design, and execution of how Haast integrates with the enterprise tools our customers already depend on, think: Salesforce, Adobe, Microsoft ecosystem, and more.



What You'll Own

 - Design, architect, and build production integrations with major enterprise platforms (Salesforce, Adobe, Microsoft ecosystem, and others)

 - Architect our integration platform: APIs, webhooks, OAuth flows, and authentication standards that scale

 - Ensure integrations surface our AI insights seamlessly into customers' existing workflows, fast, robust, and intuitive

 - Make high-impact technical decisions quickly on integration patterns, third-party dependencies, and platform evolution

 - You challenge "why" and "how" to ensure we are delivering the best possible experience for our users across integrated systems

 - Shape our engineering culture, standards, and tooling as we grow
   
   

Who We're Looking For

 - You've built integrations and APIs at meaningful scale, you write clean code with strong reasoning around design, and you genuinely care about how systems work, not just whether they run

 - You're deep on one or more of: Go, Node.js/TypeScript, or Python and you're comfortable enough on the frontend to contribute when it matters

 - You understand APIs, distributed systems, and OAuth/authentication patterns in production

 - You've shipped integrations with major platforms: Salesforce, Microsoft, Adobe APIs, or similar enterprise tools, and understand the nuances of each

 - You've shipped in fast-moving environments. You know what it takes to move without sacrificing reliability

 - You're curious about how LLMs work and genuinely excited about embedding them into enterprise workflows
   
   

Why Join Haast

 - Real impact, day one. Your integrations unlock adoption pathways for major global enterprises. It's production-grade work solving real compliance problems.

 - Meaningful equity upside. We're building a generational company in a $50B market. You'll own a meaningful stake in that value creation. We believe in sharing success with the team that builds it.

 - Exceptional learning velocity. Series A is where it gets real. You'll learn more about scaling systems, working with customers, and building platforms in 12 months here than most roles offer in three years.

 - Engineering-driven culture. No red tape. No performance theatre. Just shipping. We hire smart people and get out of their way.

 - Flexibility and community. Hybrid from our Sydney office, flexible hours, and a team that actually wants to work together.
   
   

How to Apply

We're looking for people who've shipped things they're proud of and want to work on a problem that genuinely matters.

Apply with:

 1. Your CV

 2. A b

source_jobs.title: Expressions of Interest
source_jobs.description:
WE HIRE EXCEPTIONAL PEOPLE.

Sometimes that means creating a role that doesn't exist yet. If you think you belong here, we want to hear from you.



The kind of people we look for

We hire for drive, initiative, and the ability to operate in a fast-moving, high-stakes environment. Here's a brief snapshot into some of our current teams:

 - Engineering and AI: People who want to ship real agentic systems, not demos.

 - Commercial: Enterprise sales and GTM operators who know how to open doors and close them.

 - Customer Success & Implementation: Professionals who can sit with a GC or CCO, diagnose a broken workflow, and architect the AI-powered fix.

 - Product and Design: Builders who will become obsessed with making complex compliance workflows feel effortless.

 - Marketing and Brand: Storytellers who can translate frontier technology into language that resonates with enterprise buyers.
   
   

What we offer

 - Competitive Salary & Benefits including PTO & Health cover (US Only)

 - Flexible work: US remote or Sydney Hybrid

 - Equity & Upside: We believe in sharing our success with the people who build it.

 - Lead the evolution: Help transition the industry from dull, traditional SaaS to AI-powered agentic workflows.

 - Variety of Work: No two weeks will be the same.

 - High Growth, High Stakes: Learn more in 12 months than most roles offer in 3 years.
   

How to apply

Send us your CV and a short note on what draws you to Haast and where you think you'd have the most impact. We review expressions of interest on an ongoing basis and reach out when there's a strong match, current opening or not.




At Haast, we believe the best ideas come from diverse teams. We're committed to building one that reflects the world we work in, across background, experience, orientation, ability, and perspective. If something here resonates, reach out.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Enterprise Account Executive - Early ANZ GTM Team

Be one of the first enterprise sellers at a Series A AI company rewriting how compliance works across a $50B global market.



About Haast

We aren't just talking about AI, we're shipping one of the first enterprise-grade LLM platforms already delivering measurable results to compliance and legal teams today.

In two years, we've transformed compliance from a painful checkbox exercise into a smart, automated workflow: 80% faster reviews, 4x productivity gains.

We just closed a $12M Series A led by Peak XV Partners, backed by DST Global and Airtree. And we're just getting started.

Think Canva for design. Atlassian for projects. Haast for compliance.

Why this role exists

Compliance is a $50B global problem, and we are rewriting how it's solved. Our home market is Australia, and enterprise deals here are won through trust, relationships, and genuine domain fluency.

As we build the commercial foundation to support our US expansion, we need a seasoned enterprise seller here in Sydney who can open doors, close deals, and help shape what best-in-class GTM looks like at Haast.



What you'll own

 - Build the ANZ GTM motion: define outreach strategies, shape pipeline, and open key enterprise doors across regulated industries including financial services, insurance, and legal.

 - Drive revenue growth: lead enterprise conversations from first contact through to close.

 - Consult and demo: translate complex AI capabilities into clear, compelling business value for compliance and legal buyers.

 - Be the market voice: surface insights from ANZ customers to influence our global product roadmap.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally: with Product, Engineering, and Marketing to sharpen GTM playbooks and positioning.

 - Represent Haast: at industry events and across your network of marketing, compliance and risk leaders in Australia.
   
   

You're probably a fit if:

 - You have enterprise sales pedigree: a strong track record of exceeding targets and closing complex B2B SaaS deals with large Australian enterprises.

 - You have genuine industry fluency: you understand how marketing, compliance and legal functions actually work inside regulated businesses

 - You communicate clearly: you can take a complex AI product and distil its value into sharp, business-relevant messaging for CMO, General Counsel or Chief Compliance Officers.

 - You have a startup mindset: comfortable with ambiguity, adaptable, and genuinely excited to help build something from scratch rather than manage what already exists.

 - You're AI-curious: you follow what's happening in enterprise AI and want to be part of shaping how it lands in the compliance space.
   
   

Nice to have, not essential:

 - Experience selling to or within enterprise marketing, legal, or compliance teams in regulated industries.

 - Time at a scale-up or startup where you've moved fast and worn multiple hats.
   
   

Why Haast?

 - Salary: Competitive base + uncapped commission

 - Equity: Meaningful options, we share the upside with the people who build it

 - Flexible working: Sydney hybrid, with genuine flexibility

 - Impact: Join as a founding ANZ GTM member and help shape our commercial presence in a $50B market

 - Trajectory: Work with top-tier enterprise customers, backed by Peak XV, DST Global, and Airtree

 - Growth: Learn more in 12 months than most roles offer in three years
   
   

Funding secured. Traction proven. Time to scale.

Apply with your CV and a brief note on how you'd approach building pipeline from scratch in a new enterprise market.

No closing date. We review applications on a rolling basis.

At Haast, we believe bold ideas come from diverse perspectives. We're committed to building a team that reflects the world we work in. Even if you don't tick every box, we'd love to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Staff Engineer
source_jobs.description:
STAFF ENGINEER

Ready to build the platform that rewrites how a $50B industry operates?




ABOUT HAAST

We aren’t just "experimenting" with AI - we are shipping one of the first enterprise-grade LLM platforms delivering mission-critical value to teams today.

Our AI helps teams complete compliance reviews 80% faster and boosts productivity by 4x.



Design has Canva. Projects have Trello. Now, compliance has Haast.




WHY THIS ROLE EXISTS

Compliance is a $50B global problem, and we are rewriting how it’s solved.

We aren't looking for "ticket-takers" or builders who wait for a specification document to get things going. We are looking for high-agency engineers who have the passion to own the problem, the solution and the outcome - from system design through analysing adoption, solving complex problems along the way.

The platform is proven. Enterprise adoption is real. What comes next is the architecture, the agentic systems and the infrastructure that scales this to a global standard.




THE ROLE: ACCOUNTABILITY & OWNERSHIP

As a Staff Engineer, you won’t just be "working on a codebase", you'll lead the development of end-to-end features, architecting how our AI insights are surfaced to users and ensuring the system is robust, fast, and intuitive.

You won't just be delivering features, you'll architect and design our platform to keep us lean and robust as we scale. You'll be a technical leader and the goto person as we make strategic and tactical tech decisions. Together, we'll build a delivery platform purpose-built to enable agentic code development in safety.




HOW YOU’LL MAKE AN IMPACT:

 - Extreme Ownership: You take full accountability for the features you build, from initial discovery with the product team to deployment and monitoring.

 - Product-Minded Engineering: You don’t just build what’s asked; you challenge "why" and "how" to ensure we are delivering the best possible solutions for our users and outcomes for our business.

 - Full-Stack Agility: You’ll move seamlessly between crafting polished, responsive interfaces to developing the scalable, complex systems that handle the heavy lifting.

 - Drive Excellence: You raise the bar for the team. You champion clean, pragmatic architecture and know how to use agentic coding with a "ship fast, but never broken" mentality and you can help us get there too.

 - Mentorship: You lead by example, fuelling a culture of passion, curiosity, and continuous improvement.
   
   


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

While our current stack is Svelte and Python, we believe great engineers can master any tool. We care about your ability to think like a product owner -, your obsession with quality, and your drive to move the needle for our users.

If you have deep experience in React, Vue, Node, or Go and you understand how to build reliable, scalable web apps - we want to talk to you.




YOU’RE A FIT IF:

 - You are proven at Staff or Senior level: You own initiatives end to end, provide mentorship and guidance to junior engineers, and raise the bar on what good looks like.

 - You are a pragmatic Architect: You have a track record of operating SaaS solutions at scale. You understand that "perfect is the enemy of shipped," making intentional trade-offs to build systems that are simple to operate and resilient over the long term.

 - You have a Product Mindset: You are driven by impact, not just lines of code. You care about the business problem we are solving.

 - You are Accountability-First: When you say "I've got this," the team knows it’s as good as done.

 - You have Deep Full-Stack Experience: You have a proven track record of building and scaling modern web applications (regardless of the specific framework).

 - You are Curious & Adaptable: You stay ahead of the curve in AI and web tech because you love the space, not because it’s your job.
   
   


WHY HAAST?

 - Real AI, Real Production: Work on a platform that is already trusted by major global institutions.

 - You'll make th

source_jobs.title: Founders Associate
source_jobs.description:
FOUNDERS ASSOCIATE

Sydney, Hybrid

Haast just closed a $12M Series A backed by Peak XV Partners, DST Global, and Airtree. If the best part of your consulting career has been solving the hardest problems in the room, but you're tired of handing off the deck and watching from a distance, this is where you step in.

 


ABOUT HAAST

We aren't experimenting with AI. We're shipping one of the first enterprise-grade agentic platforms for legal and compliance teams, and it's already in production with global enterprises.

In two years: compliance review times cut by 80%. Productivity up 4x. 4.5x revenue growth.

Design has Canva. Projects have Atlassian. Compliance has Haast.

We're targeting a $50B global market and are in the early stages of US expansion, with strong ANZ enterprise traction already behind us.

 


WHY THIS ROLE EXISTS

We're a small, fast-moving team and the founders are still deeply in the work. As we scale, we need someone who can sit alongside leadership, take the ambiguous problems off their plate, and drive them to a resolution.

 

You'll move across every function: Sales, Customer Success, Product, Finance, and GTM. Some problems will be simple fix. Some will reshape how we operate forever.

 


WHAT YOU'LL OWN

Strategy & Planning

 - Work directly with the founders on OKR setting, business planning, and GTM strategy as we scale into the US

 - Drive board and investor-level reporting; synthesise performance data into clear strategic recommendations

Diagnosis & Execution

 - Jump into high-priority operational problems across Sales, CS, Product, and Finance on sprint cycles of two to four weeks

 - Identify root causes, not just symptoms; bring a solution with a point of view, not a list of options

Operating Infrastructure

 - Build the playbooks and processes that let us scale without accumulating operational debt

 - Own the metrics that matter; pricing performance, sales funnel efficiency, retention patterns, and surface insights the business can act on

Product & Engineering Interface

 - When you identify an operational problem with a technology fix, scope it clearly and work with engineering to ship it

 

Who We're Looking For

You've come through a top-tier strategy consulting firm (MBB or equivalent) and have two to four years of experience. You might be a senior associate or engagement manager who's been looking for the right moment to step into an operator role.

Or perhaps you've moved into a high-growth startup after consulting and want to go deeper than your current scope allows.

Either way, the pattern is the same: you're a rigorous thinker who doesn't stop at the analysis. You want to own the outcome.

 
 

Why Join Haast

 - Real ownership from week one. You're not writing the summary of what happened in the meeting. You're in the meeting, shaping the decision, and accountable for what comes next

 - Meaningful equity. We're building in a $50B market and we share the upside with the people doing the work

 - Learning velocity. You'll work alongside a founding team with MBB and top-tier law backgrounds who are unusually willing to teach

 - Variety. Your scope will shift every few weeks. No two sprints are the same

 - Sydney-based, genuinely flexible. We work from our Sydney office and support arrangements that let people do their best work

 

How to Apply

Send us your CV and a short note answering this question:

 

Tell us about a time you diagnosed a genuinely ambiguous, high-stakes problem. What did you decide to do about it, and what was the outcome?

 

No closing date. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.

 

At Haast, bold ideas come from diverse perspectives. We're committed to building a team that reflects the world we work in. Even if you don't tick every box, we'd love to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Partnerships Manager
source_jobs.description:
If building strong, strategic partnerships with the tech giants sounds like your kind of challenge, you're in the right place.

Haast is one of the first enterprise-grade AI platforms for compliance and legal teams, already trusted by major regulated enterprises, VC-backed, and expanding fast in the US.

We're looking for a Partnerships Manager to execute our US partnership strategy, driving adoption and integration with the likes of Google, AWS, and key ecosystem partners. This is an individual contributor role where you'll own pipeline generation and revenue attribution through your partnerships.





ABOUT HAAST

We've transformed compliance from a painful checkbox exercise into an intelligent, automated workflow, cutting review times by 80% and boosting productivity 4x.

Think Canva for design. Atlassian for projects. Haast for compliance.

With a $12M Series A behind us, led by Peak XV Partners with backing from DST Global and Airtree, we're focused on what's next: global expansion.





WHAT YOU'LL OWN

Partnership execution and growth; from strategy through to revenue delivery.

 - Own the partnership roadmap: build joint go-to-market plans, negotiate co-sell agreements, and drive integration and visibility.

 - Execute co-selling with hyperscaler sales teams to bring Haast into enterprise deals alongside major tech players.

 - Build enablement materials, technical integration guides, and joint value propositions that make it easy for hyperscaler partners to sell Haast

 - Support channel partnerships with selected GSIs and agencies where hyperscaler relationships open doors

 - Manage ongoing partner relationships: quarterly business reviews, deal registration, deal escalation, and expansion planning

 - Work closely with Sales, Product, and Customer Success to ensure partner deals land, expand, and become net-new revenue
   
   


WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Proven experience in enterprise partnerships, channel partnerships, or business development within SaaS (hyperscaler partnerships experience is essential)

 - A real network with Google Cloud, AWS, Microsoft, or similar ecosystem partners; people you can actually call and move the needle with

 - Evidence of partnership pipeline generated and revenue closed through partners (bring the numbers)

 - Experience navigating commercial partnership agreements, including co-sell terms, co-marketing, and integration commitments

 - Familiarity with regulated markets (financial services, insurance, telco, healthcare) where compliance is mission-critical
   
   


WHY JOIN HAAST

 - Real impact, day one. Hyperscaler partnerships are a defining growth lever for Haast, not a nice-to-have. Your partnerships directly shape enterprise adoption.

 - Meaningful equity upside. We share our success with the people who build it

 - Exceptional learning velocity. Learn more in 12 months than most roles offer in three years.

 - Founder access and real ownership. You'll work directly with our founding team and have genuine influence over how we win partnerships.

 - Competitive compensation. $170-180k USD base salary + solid commission plan with strong earning potential

 - Flexibility. 401k, health insurance, generous PTO, fully remote/flexible working across the US.

 - Mission-driven culture. Help global enterprises move from error-prone reviews to intelligent, AI-powered compliance workflows.
   
   


HOW TO APPLY

Send us two things:

 1. Your CV (we want to see the numbers behind your partnerships work)

 2. A short note on a hyperscaler or major strategic partnership you've built that drove significant growth



Applications reviewed on an ongoing basis. No closing date.

At Haast, we believe bold ideas come from diverse perspectives. Even if you don't tick every box, we'd still love to hear from you.

#LI-Remote

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR FULL STACK ENGINEER

Build the AI platform that's rewriting a $50B industry.




About Haast

We're building one of the first agentic systems for enterprise legal and compliance teams that actually automates their manual work. End-to-end. Delivering 80% faster compliance reviews and 4x productivity gains.

We recently closed a $12M USD Series A (Peak XV Partners, DST Global, Airtree) and are ramping hard; building the infrastructure that will completely re-define how enterprises think about compliance.

Think Canva for design. Atlassian for projects. Haast for compliance.




The Problem

Compliance is a $50B global challenge. Enterprise legal and compliance teams spend a significant amount of time manually reviewing documents against policy, spotting regulatory risk, and signing off on content before go-to-market. It's painful. It scales terribly. It's mission-critical.

We're building the infrastructure that makes this manageable at scale. You'll be working on systems that directly reduce risk and unlock productivity for some of the world's largest organisations.




The Role

This is a full-stack role in a high-autonomy engineering team where your code ships to production and directly impacts enterprise customers. You won't be managing legacy systems, you'll be solving hard, high-stakes technical problems with real commercial impact.

You'll own end-to-end technical decisions: designing systems, architecting solutions, shipping to production, and iterating based on customer feedback. You'll work directly with our founding team, move fast, and have genuine influence over how we build.




What You'll Own

 - Design, architect, and operate scalable services and APIs that power our LLM compliance platform

 - Architecting how our AI insights are surfaced to users, ensuring the system is robust, fast, and intuitive.

 - Make high-impact technical decisions quickly.

 - You challenge "why" and "how" to ensure we are delivering the best possible experience for our users.

 - Shape our engineering culture, standards, and tooling as we grow
   
   
   

Who We're Looking For

 - You've built systems at meaningful scale, you write clean code with strong reasoning around design, and you genuinely care about how systems work, not just whether they run

 - You're deep on one or more of: Go, Node.js/TypeScript, or Python and you're comfortable enough on the frontend to contribute when it matters.

 - You understand APIs and distributed systems in production.

 - You've shipped in fast-moving environments. You know what it takes to move without sacrificing reliability.

 - You're curious about how LLMs work and genuinely excited about building on top of them.
   
   

Why Join Haast

 - Real impact, day one. Your code runs inside the workflows of major global enterprises immediately. It's production-grade work solving real compliance problems.

 - Meaningful equity upside. We're building a generational company in a $50B market. You'll own a meaningful stake in that value creation. We believe in sharing success with the team that builds it.

 - Exceptional learning velocity. Series A is where it gets real. You'll learn more about scaling systems, working with customers, and building products in 12 months here than most roles offer in three years.

 - Engineering-driven culture. No red tape. No performance theatre. Just shipping. We hire smart people and get out of their way.

 - Flexibility and community. Hybrid from our Sydney office, flexible hours, and a team that actually wants to work together.
   
   

How to Apply

We're looking for people who've shipped things they're proud of and want to work on a problem that genuinely matters.

Apply with:

 1. Your CV

 2. A brief note on this question: Tell us about a product that you've worked on either at work or in your personal time that you're proud of.

No closing date. We review applications on a rolling basis.

At Haast, we believe bold ideas come from diverse perspectives. We'

notes: Haast is a Series A AI company transforming compliance for enterprises.
